title: EligibleCollateralElection
description: Specifies the collateral posting obligations for the security provider party(ies).

party.description: Specifies the party providing the security.

asPermitted.description: If set to True, the Control Agreement is a Credit Support Document with respect to the party(ies).

eligibleCollateral.description: The eligible collateral as specified in relation to the pledgor/chargor/obligor(s) posting obligation.

excludedCollateral.description: The excluded collateral as specified in relation to the pledgor/chargor/obligor(s) posting obligation.

additionalLanguage.description: The additional language that might be specified by the parties to the legal agreement.

otherEligibleSupport.description: Specifies the Other Eligible Support conditions. If not specified, this election is deemed as not applicable.
